door_greet.speaker: Narrator
door_greet.text:
The office door is heavy. You've opened it a thousand times.
Tonight feels different.

choices.text: Hesitate. One more look at the desk.

door_hesitate.speaker: Narrator
door_hesitate.text:
The screensaver flickers. The wet window. The empty coffee cup.
You've spent too many nights here.

door_leave.speaker: Narrator
door_leave.text:
The door closes behind you with a soft click.
The hallway stretches ahead, dim and quiet.
To the lobby. To the street. To wherever this night takes you.
